mapper.select:
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM member_points_serial t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.id},'%')
AND t.create_time >= #{memberPointsSerialEntity.startTime}
AND t.create_time <= #{memberPointsSerialEntity.endTime}
AND t.member_id like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.memberId},'%')
AND t.member_points_id like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.memberPointsId},'%')
AND t.points like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.points},'%')
AND t.type like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.type},'%')
AND t.category like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.category},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.status},'%')
order by create_time desc
limit #{map.offset},#{map.rows}

SELECT count(1) FROM member_points_serial t WHERE t.is_deleted = 2
AND t.id like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.id},'%')
AND t.member_id like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.memberId},'%')
AND t.member_points_id like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.memberPointsId},'%')
AND t.points like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.points},'%')
AND t.type like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.type},'%')
AND t.category like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.category},'%')
AND t.create_user like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.createUser},'%')
AND t.create_time like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.createTime},'%')
AND t.update_user like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.updateUser},'%')
AND t.update_time like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.updateTime},'%')
AND t.is_deleted like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.isDeleted},'%')
AND t.status like concat('%',#{memberPointsSerialEntity.status},'%')
SELECT t.*, t1.real_name create_user_name FROM member_points_serial t LEFT OUTER JOIN castle_sys_user t1 ON t.create_user = t1.id WHERE t.is_deleted = 2 AND t.id = #{id}
